# VoiceFlow

**AI-Powered Speech Recognition Web Application**

This repository contains the source code for VoiceFlow, a modern speech-to-text application.

## Quick Links

- 🚀 **Live Demo**: https://speech-recognition-web-rho.vercel.app/
- 📖 **Documentation**: See [README.md](README.md)
- 🤝 **Contributing**: See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- 📜 **Changelog**: See [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md)
- 🔒 **Security**: See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)
- 📄 **License**: See [LICENSE](LICENSE)

## What is VoiceFlow?

VoiceFlow is a web application that converts spoken words into text in real-time using the Web Speech API. Built with modern web technologies including Next.js, React, and TypeScript, it provides a seamless user experience for voice transcription.

### Key Features

✨ **Real-time Speech Recognition** - Converts speech to text instantly  
🎨 **Modern UI** - Beautiful dark and light themes  
📱 **Responsive Design** - Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile  
⚡ **Fast & Performant** - Optimized for speed  
♿ **Accessible** - WCAG compliant  
🌍 **Multi-language** - Supports various languages  

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5.7
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4.2
- **Components**: shadcn/ui, Lucide React Icons
- **Hosting**: Vercel
- **Analytics**: Vercel Analytics

## Getting Started

### Quick Start

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/voiceflow.git
cd voiceflow

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run development server
npm run dev

# Open http://localhost:3000
```

### Build for Production

```bash
npm run build
npm start
```

See [README.md](README.md) for detailed documentation.

## Project Structure

```
voiceflow/
├── app/              # Next.js app directory
├── components/       # React components
├── lib/             # Utilities and helpers
├── public/          # Static assets
├── docs/            # Documentation
├── .github/         # GitHub templates and workflows
└── README.md        # Full documentation
```
